What's New
.
Stay up to date with the latest Bird features and improvements.
What's New
March 2026
AI Chat Speed Improvements — Reduced response latency by 60% with router bypass, greeting fast path, and optimized prompt sizes. New category-based routing for instant agent selection.
February 2026
Travel Explorer — Plan trips with AI-powered destination research, hotel recommendations, and itinerary building. Integrated with maps and booking.
January 2026
Forge Pipeline — Autonomous code delivery with AI review, tiered testing, and health monitoring. Zero-touch deployments with automatic rollback.
We use cookies
For authentication, analytics, and marketing to improve your experience.

chevron-down
block-quote
On this page
block-quote
Bird Documentation
Welcome to Bird's documentation! Find guides and tutorials to help you set up and use our platform.
hashtag
Start using Bird
Set up an account, import your customer data, and learn how to start using Bird for marketing, sales, and payments.
Get a demo →
arrow-up-right
hashtag
Getting started: most popular articles
Add users to your organization
Setup your first channel
Install a connector
Import your contacts into Bird
Get started with AI employees
hashtag
Find your use case
You have to
register
arrow-up-right
for a Bird account before you can use any of these products or solutions.
Build a campaign
Build and send an Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Push or RCS Campaign.
Build a Journey
Create targeted marketing sequences that adapt to customer actions.
Get contacts into Bird
Bring your contacts into Bird, with CSV uploads or data flows.
Target customers
Manage your audience.
Design content
Craft engaging message templates.
Build webforms
Collect customer contact details and embed forms on your store or website.
Measure campaign performance
See your campaign results.
hashtag
Get contacts into Bird
To bring your contacts into Bird, you can install an
integration
, such as
Shopify
or
HubSpot
, or import contacts with a
CSV file
. Each contact will have a
profile
, where information about subscription statuses, event history, and custom and integration properties are stored.
chevron-right
Import contacts with a CSV file
hashtag
See the full article →
Prepare your CSV file using the correct format, ensuring it includes at least one identifier like a phone number or email for each contact. Use the provided demo file as a template to avoid formatting issues.
Access the "Contacts" section from the side panel, click
Add Contact
, then
Import from CSV
. You can drag and drop the file or browse to select it from your device, then review it.
If the CSV file includes subscription statuses, you can skip this step. Otherwise, update the subscription status for each contact based on their opt-in preferences for marketing messages. If no marketing subscriptions are present, select
Import without updating subscription status
.
During import, you can add contacts to an automatically-generated list named with the import's date and time, or to new or existing lists. This can be customized during the import process.
Post-import, visit the
Imports
tab to view details of each import, such as the file name, lists added to, contacts skipped or updated, total contacts, and timestamps of import activities.
chevron-right
Import contacts by installing an integration
hashtag
See the full article →
Install an integration by clicking your name at the bottom left-hand side of your screen, then clicking
Integrations
.
Find and install your integration. Once you install an integration, contact data is automatically imported and contact profiles in Bird are updated.
See also
Integration data sync →
hashtag
Target customers
Manage your audience and get granular with your targeting by creating dynamic
segments
and static
lists
.
chevron-right
Create a segment
hashtag
See the full article →
Navigate to
Audience
>
Lists & segments
.
Click
Create new
>
Create segment
.
Enter a name for your segment and an optional description.
In the
Segment definition
section, decide if the contacts should match "All" or "Any" of the specified conditions.
Apply filters by attributes or condition groups for precise audience targeting.
Utilize "and/or" filters to refine your selection further.
Preview the matching contacts, and when satisfied, hit the
Save Segment
button.
See also:
Contact activity
Create a segment based on contact activity
hashtag
Design content
To craft your emails in Bird, you can choose from a library of
pre-designed templates
or
design your own from scratch
. Our drag-and-drop email builder is easy to use, and templates can be personalized with both customer data and products from your ecommerce store.
chevron-right
Use a prebuilt email template
hashtag
See the full article →
Navigate to
Content > Email templates > Template gallery
.
Search or browse to find a template.
Click on the template for more information.
To use it, click
Clone template
, set up your project, and click
Create template
.
Edit the template as needed and click
Publish
when you're ready to use it.
chevron-right
Create an email template from scratch
hashtag
See the full article →
Navigate to
Content > Email templates > Create blank email
.
Name your email, select a locale, and click
Create new email
.
Choose
Build from scratch
and click
Get started
.
Enter a subject line, add custom or prebuilt content blocks, and insert any variables.
Use desktop and mobile preview options in the email builder to check the email's appearance. For a more accurate view, send test emails to various email clients and devices.
Click
Publish
when you're ready to use it.
See also:
Email content, styling, and personalization
hashtag
Send campaigns
Send your marketing campaign directly to your customers' inboxes by sending them an email campaign.
chevron-right
Send an email campaign
hashtag
See the full article →
Confirm that your Email channel,
email template
, and opted-in customer segment or list are ready.
Go to
Campaigns > Create campaign
.
Name your campaign, choose
Email
as the type, optionally add tags, then
Save and continue
.
Choose target lists or segments from the
Send to
dropdown. Optionally exclude specific lists with
Don't send to
.
Click
Continue to content
.
Select the sending account and input your sender details.
Choose and configure your email template.
Check the message preview, select a test contact, and
Send a test message
.
Choose
Schedule or send
, select
Send now
or schedule for later.
See also:
Install Email
Create an email template
chevron-right
Send a WhatsApp campaign
hashtag
See the full article →
arrow-up-right
Confirm that your WhatsApp channel, WhatsApp template, and opted-in customer segment or list are ready.
Go to
Campaigns > Create campaign
.
Name your campaign, choose
WhatsApp
as the type, optionally add tags, then
Save and continue
.
Choose target lists or segments from the
Send to
dropdown. Optionally exclude specific lists with
Don't send to
.
Click
Continue to content
.
Select the sending account and input your sender details.
Choose and configure your email template.
Check the message preview, select a test contact, and
Send a test message
.
Choose
Schedule or send
, select
Send now
or schedule for later.
See also:
Create a WhatsApp template
Install WhatsApp
hashtag
Measure campaign performance
Spot trends, see which campaigns have performed the best, and dive into detailed data.
chevron-right
View campaign reports
hashtag
See the full article →
Navigate to
Campaigns
.
Select your campaign, and click
View report
.
Email Campaigns:
Overview Tab
: Shows performance including delivery rates, open rates, and click rates.
Engagement Tab
: Highlights spam complaints and unsubscribes.
Bounce Tab
: Details on bounced emails, including types of bounces and bounce rates.
Rejection Tab
: Information on rejected emails and delivery failures.
Deliverability Tab
: Insights into email deliverability issues.
WhatsApp Campaigns:
Overview Tab
: Summarizes performance metrics like delivery and read rates.
Failure Reasons
: Explains why campaigns failed.
SMS Campaigns:
Overview Tab
: Presents sending and delivery performance.
Failure Reasons
: Details reasons for campaign failures.
Each tab presents critical data and visualizations to understand and improve your marketing efforts.
Last updated
1 month ago
Was this helpful?
This site uses cookies to deliver its service and to analyze traffic. By browsing this site, you accept the
privacy policy
.
close
Accept
Reject

analysis.name: Bird (formerly MessageBird)
analysis.tagline: Tell Bird what you need. Consider it done.
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one AI-powered multi-channel business communication platform combining email, SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, push, and voice with built-in CDP, automation, and AI agents.
analysis.ideal_customer: High-volume businesses in e-commerce, SaaS, fintech, banking, and marketplaces needing multi-channel marketing automation with a unified customer data layer

features.name: email campaigns
features.description: Send bulk or targeted marketing emails with template builder and deliverability controls

features.name: sms campaigns
features.description: Send SMS/MMS campaigns globally with per-country rate card

features.name: whatsapp campaigns
features.description: Send WhatsApp marketing messages via Meta-approved templates

features.name: push notification campaigns
features.description: Send mobile push notifications at $0.0005 per notification

features.name: rcs campaigns
features.description: Send Google RCS rich-channel messages starting at $0.005 per message

features.name: apple messages for business (amb)
features.description: Apple Messages Business channel for customer messaging; available on Enterprise tier only

features.name: journeys
features.description: Multi-step automated marketing sequences that adapt to customer actions and events

features.name: customer data platform (cdp)
features.description: Unified customer data layer for storing profiles, events, and attributes across channels

features.name: contact segmentation
features.description: Dynamic audience segments built with attribute filters, condition groups, and and/or logic

features.name: contact lists
features.description: Static contact lists for targeting; auto-generated on CSV import

features.name: csv contact import
features.description: Bulk contact upload via CSV with subscription status mapping and list assignment

features.name: suppressions
features.description: Manage suppression lists to prevent messaging opted-out or blocked contacts

features.name: companies
features.description: B2B account-level contact grouping under company objects

features.name: custom events
features.description: Track arbitrary user actions as custom events for trigger-based automation

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Define custom data schemas beyond standard contact properties

features.name: email templates
features.description: Reusable email template library with visual editor

features.name: message templates
features.description: Reusable templates for SMS, WhatsApp, and other channel messages

features.name: content blocks
features.description: Modular reusable content components embedded across templates

features.name: media library
features.description: Centralized asset storage for images and media used in campaigns

features.name: translation files
features.description: Localization support via translation file management for multi-language campaigns

features.name: external data sources
features.description: Connect and pull data from external systems into content personalization

features.name: lookup tables
features.description: Static reference tables for mapping and enriching message content

features.name: discounts
features.description: Discount/coupon code management for e-commerce-oriented messaging

features.name: product catalog
features.description: Product data management for embedding product content in campaigns

features.name: chat widgets
features.description: Embeddable web chat widgets for live and automated customer conversations

features.name: sign-up forms
features.description: Lead capture forms embeddable on websites and stores

features.name: quizzes
features.description: Interactive quiz builder for audience engagement and data collection

features.name: landing pages
features.description: Built-in landing page builder for campaign-linked destinations

features.name: analytics dashboard
features.description: Marketing performance dashboard with channel and campaign-level metrics

features.name: channel analytics
features.description: Per-channel delivery, open, and engagement reporting

features.name: campaign reports
features.description: Detailed post-send reports for individual campaign performance

features.name: custom dashboards
features.description: Build and save custom analytics views with chosen metrics

features.name: export metrics to s3
features.description: Push analytics data exports directly to an AWS S3 bucket

features.name: automation flows
features.description: Visual workflow builder for event-triggered multi-step automations

features.name: data flows
features.description: Automated data pipelines for syncing and transforming contact data

features.name: approval flows
features.description: Governance workflow requiring human approval before campaigns or automations execute

features.name: dynamic content
features.description: Conditional content blocks that render differently based on contact attributes

features.name: personalization
features.description: Merge-tag and rule-based personalization of message content at send time

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Configurable AI employees that handle customer interactions autonomously across channels

features.name: ai chat interface
features.description: Conversational AI command interface for drafting emails, building pages, planning launches, and writing sequences

features.name: ai chat speed optimization
features.description: 60% reduced response latency via router bypass, greeting fast path, and category-based routing

features.name: email api
features.description: Transactional and bulk email sending via REST API

features.name: whatsapp api
features.description: Programmatic WhatsApp messaging via Meta-certified API

features.name: sms api
features.description: Global SMS/MMS sending and receiving via REST API

features.name: voice api
features.description: Programmatic voice call initiation, IVR, and routing via API

features.name: numbers api
features.description: Provision and manage phone numbers programmatically

features.name: sso
features.description: Single Sign-On for enterprise workspace authentication

features.name: multiple workspaces
features.description: Manage multiple isolated workspaces under one enterprise account

features.name: dedicated support team
features.description: Enterprise-tier dedicated human support team

features.name: technical account manager (tam)
features.description: Named TAM for onboarding and strategic guidance; select enterprise agreements only

features.name: sla guarantees
features.description: Contractual uptime/response SLAs; select enterprise agreements only

features.name: inbox
features.description: Unified support inbox for managing inbound customer conversations across channels

features.name: bird pay
features.description: Embedded payments product (beta) for transacting within Bird workflows

features.name: user management
features.description: Role-based access control and team member administration

features.name: deliverability tools
features.description: Email deliverability guidance, compliance tooling, and monitoring

features.name: data protection controls
features.description: GDPR and data residency compliance configuration

features.name: integration connectors
features.description: Pre-built connectors to sync contact and event data from third-party platforms

features.name: contact activity history
features.description: Per-contact timeline of events, campaign interactions, and channel activity

features.name: export & sync
features.description: Export contact and campaign data or sync to external systems

features.name: governance controls
features.description: Platform-level governance features including approval workflows and access policies

differentiators: Single platform covering email, SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, push, voice, and Apple Messages for Business
Usage-based pay-as-you-go pricing with no seat fees or commitments
Built-in CDP — no separate customer data tool required
AI agents as first-class 'employees' handling end-to-end customer interactions
Conversational AI command interface for campaign creation ('Tell Bird what you need. Consider it done.')
60% AI response latency reduction via category-based router and fast-path architecture
Bird Pay: embedded payments directly within communication workflows (beta)

recent_ships.what: AI Chat Speed Improvements — 60% latency reduction via router bypass, greeting fast path, optimized prompt sizes, and category-based routing for instant agent selection
Travel Explorer — AI-powered destination research, hotel recommendations, and itinerary building integrated with maps and booking
Forge Pipeline — Autonomous code delivery with AI review, tiered testing, health monitoring, and automatic rollback
